creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
Just the usual : 

    https://lists.x.org/archives/xorg/2024-April/061632.html

Seems to have two fixes of possible interest :

      render: Avoid possible double-free in ProcRenderAddGlyphs()

      mi: fix rounding issues around zero in miPointerSetPosition


Nothing else to report there.

--
Dennis Clarke
RISC-V/SPARC/PPC/ARM/CISC
UNIX and Linux spoken
